title: JustColor!
description: Tap color buttons to learn color names and build a custom palette.
dualVersionReason: This folder preserves the full git history from the former standalone repo zeddrix/justcolor. The playground serves the static SvelteKit build in an iframe.

title: GitHub Finder (JSX)
description: Search GitHub users with a React JSX interface.

versions.label: React source (git history)
versions.note: Original src/ is preserved in commit history.

dualVersionReason: The playground serves a pre-built Create React App bundle for static hosting. The original React source lives in git history for reference.

title: Loan Calculator
description: Calculate loan payments and amortization schedules.

title: Weather Widget
description: Display current weather conditions in a compact widget.

title: Tracalorie
description: Track daily calorie intake and meals.

title: Word Counter
description: Count words, characters, and reading time for text.

title: Task List
description: Manage tasks with a simple to-do list app.

title: GitHub Finder
description: Search GitHub users with a vanilla JavaScript interface.

title: Book List
description: Browse and manage a personal book collection.

title: JW Guitar Templates
description: Guitar chord and template reference tool.

title: Bible Query
description: Test your Biblical knowledge in this trivia game.
dualVersionReason: This folder preserves the full git history from the former standalone repo zeddrix/bible-query. The playground serves the static demo in an iframe.

title: Blog App
description: Django blog archive with a static SvelteKit preview for GitHub Pages.
dualVersionReason: GitHub Pages is static-only and cannot run Django. A SvelteKit static build mimics the blog layout for in-browser preview.

title: Microposts
description: Webpack microposts CRUD demo with an in-browser mock API for static hosting.
dualVersionReason: The original app needs json-server as a backend. The static preview uses an in-browser mock API so CRUD works on GitHub Pages.

title: DevCamper API
description: Express and MongoDB bootcamp directory API — backend reference with README preview.
dualVersionReason: This is a backend-only API and cannot run on GitHub Pages. The playground shows the README instead of an iframe.

title: Diamond in Black Pearl
description: Pink Panther meets Pirates — CLI text adventure with browser terminal and illustrated modes.

versions.label: Python CLI game (untouched)
versions.note: Preserved from standalone repo with full git history. Run: python game.py

dualVersionReason: This folder preserves the full git history from the former standalone repo zeddrix/diamond-in-black-pearl. original/game.py is untouched. GitHub Pages runs a derived engine.py in-browser via Pyodide for terminal and illustrated modes.
